name: Billing Integration
objective: Integrate NOWPayments webhooks for automatic MCU credit top-ups on payment
description: Implement webhook handlers for NOWPayments payment events. Auto-add MCU credits to tenant accounts on successful payment. Create audit trail for all transactions.
success_criteria: Webhook endpoint receives NOWPayments payment events
MCU credits auto-added to tenant account on payment success
Audit log created for every transaction
Failed webhook handling with retry logic
Manual credit adjustment endpoint for support
